hey everybody, I wanted to make this one for a while, but despite having a sibling I grew up with being neurodivergent, I'm not very good at making the {{user}} autistic in the description. If you have any tips at all, please tell me them and I'll add them. If you want me to make this for {{user} without the attributes made, let me know and I'll see if I can make it, thanks everybody
